item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-11)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 44403 Trending skills: 21351 Hot skills: 2917 Top All Time: find-skills (487393) Top Trending: simple (19273) Top Hot: agent-tools (378)

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#41): supabase-postgres-best-practices
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 31409 Source: supabase/agent-skills Description: Postgres performance optimization and best practices from Supabase. Use this skill when writing, reviewing, or optimizing Postgres queries, schema designs, or database configurations.

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#42): next-best-practices
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 30489 Source: vercel-labs/next-skills Description: Next.js best practices - file conventions, RSC boundaries, data patterns, async APIs, metadata, error handling, route handlers, image/font optimization, bundling

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#43): pptx
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 29185 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Presentation creation, editing, and analysis. When Claude needs to work with presentations (.pptx files) for: (1) Creating new presentations, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with layouts, (4) Adding comments or speaker notes, or any other presentation tasks

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#44): systematic-debugging
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 26855 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#45): docx
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 26211 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#46): writing-plans
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 24874 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#47): xlsx
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 24403 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis with support for formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization. When Claude needs to work with spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv, etc) for: (1) Creating new spreadsheets with formulas and formatting, (2) Reading or analyzing data, (3) Modify existing spreadsheets while preserving formulas, (4) Data analysis and visualization in spreadsheets, or (5) Recalculating formulas

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#48): marketing-psychology
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 22849 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to apply psychological principles, mental models, or behavioral science to marketing. Also use when the user mentions 'psychology,' 'mental models,' 'cognitive bias,' 'persuasion,' 'behavioral science,' 'why people buy,' 'decision-making,' or 'consumer behavior.' This skill provides 70+ mental models organized for marketing application.

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#49): test-driven-development
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 22146 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#50): webapp-testing
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 21223 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#1): agent-tools
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #1 Installs: 378 Source: inference-shell/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): firecrawl-browser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 24 Source: firecrawl/cli Description: Cloud browser automation for pages requiring interaction — clicks, form fills, login, pagination, infinite scroll. Use this skill when the user needs to interact with a webpage, log into a site, click buttons, fill forms, navigate multi-step flows, handle pagination, or when regular scraping fails because content requires JavaScript interaction. Triggers on "click", "fill out the form", "log in to", "paginated", "infinite scroll", "interact with the page", or "scrape failed". Provides remote Chromium sessions with persistent profiles.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): firecrawl-scrape
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 23 Source: firecrawl/cli Description: Extract clean markdown from any URL, including JavaScript-rendered SPAs. Use this skill whenever the user provides a URL and wants its content, says "scrape", "grab", "fetch", "pull", "get the page", "extract from this URL", or "read this webpage". Handles JS-rendered pages, multiple concurrent URLs, and returns LLM-optimized markdown. Use this instead of WebFetch for any webpage content extraction.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): firecrawl-crawl
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 23 Source: firecrawl/cli Description: Bulk extract content from an entire website or site section. Use this skill when the user wants to crawl a site, extract all pages from a docs section, bulk-scrape multiple pages following links, or says "crawl", "get all the pages", "extract everything under /docs", "bulk extract", or needs content from many pages on the same site. Handles depth limits, path filtering, and concurrent extraction.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): firecrawl-agent
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 23 Source: firecrawl/cli Description: AI-powered autonomous data extraction that navigates complex sites and returns structured JSON. Use this skill when the user wants structured data from websites, needs to extract pricing tiers, product listings, directory entries, or any data as JSON with a schema. Triggers on "extract structured data", "get all the products", "pull pricing info", "extract as JSON", or when the user provides a JSON schema for website data. More powerful than simple scraping for multi-page structured extraction.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): firecrawl-map
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 23 Source: firecrawl/cli Description: Discover and list all URLs on a website, with optional search filtering. Use this skill when the user wants to find a specific page on a large site, list all URLs, see the site structure, find where something is on a domain, or says "map the site", "find the URL for", "what pages are on", or "list all pages". Essential when the user knows which site but not which exact page.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): firecrawl-search
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 23 Source: firecrawl/cli Description: Web search with full page content extraction. Use this skill whenever the user asks to search the web, find articles, research a topic, look something up, find recent news, discover sources, or says "search for", "find me", "look up", "what are people saying about", or "find articles about". Returns real search results with optional full-page markdown — not just snippets. Provides capabilities beyond Claude's built-in WebSearch.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): firecrawl-download
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 23 Source: firecrawl/cli Description: Download an entire website as local files — markdown, screenshots, or multiple formats per page. Use this skill when the user wants to save a site locally, download documentation for offline use, bulk-save pages as files, or says "download the site", "save as local files", "offline copy", "download all the docs", or "save for reference". Combines site mapping and scraping into organized local directories.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): requesting-code-review
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 49 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): agent-browser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 124 Source: vercel-labs/agent-browser Description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): sleek-design-mobile-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 256 Source: sleekdotdesign/agent-skills Description: Use when the user wants to design a mobile app, create screens, build UI, or interact with their Sleek projects. Covers high-level requests ("design an app that does X") and specific ones ("list my projects", "create a new project", "screenshot that screen").

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): writing-plans
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 55 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): executing-plans
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 52 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): stock-analysis
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 32 Source: gracefullight/stock-checker Description: Analyze stocks and cryptocurrencies using Yahoo Finance data. Supports portfolio management (create, add, remove assets), crypto analysis (Top 20 by market cap), and periodic performance reports (daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly). 8 analysis dimensions for stocks, 3 for crypto. Use for stock analysis, portfolio tracking, earnings reactions, or crypto monitoring.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): xlsx
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 57 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis with support for formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization. When Claude needs to work with spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv, etc) for: (1) Creating new spreadsheets with formulas and formatting, (2) Reading or analyzing data, (3) Modify existing spreadsheets while preserving formulas, (4) Data analysis and visualization in spreadsheets, or (5) Recalculating formulas

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): programmatic-seo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 33 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to create SEO-driven pages at scale using templates and data. Also use when the user mentions "programmatic SEO," "template pages," "pages at scale," "directory pages," "location pages," "[keyword] + [city] pages," "comparison pages," "integration pages," or "building many pages for SEO." For auditing existing SEO issues, see seo-audit.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): excel-automation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 15 Source: claude-office-skills/skills Description: >

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): rivetkit
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 33 Source: rivet-dev/skills Description: RivetKit backend and Rivet Actor runtime guidance. Use for building, modifying, debugging, or testing Rivet Actors, registries, serverless/runner modes, deployment, or actor-based workflows.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): copywriting
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 49 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to write, rewrite, or improve marketing copy for any page — including homepage, landing pages, pricing pages, feature pages, about pages, or product pages. Also use when the user says "write copy for," "improve this copy," "rewrite this page," "marketing copy," "headline help," or "CTA copy." For email copy, see email-sequence. For popup copy, see popup-cro.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): marketing-psychology
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 33 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to apply psychological principles, mental models, or behavioral science to marketing. Also use when the user mentions 'psychology,' 'mental models,' 'cognitive bias,' 'persuasion,' 'behavioral science,' 'why people buy,' 'decision-making,' or 'consumer behavior.' This skill provides 70+ mental models organized for marketing application.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): analytics-tracking
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 32 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to set up, improve, or audit analytics tracking and measurement. Also use when the user mentions "set up tracking," "GA4," "Google Analytics," "conversion tracking," "event tracking," "UTM parameters," "tag manager," "GTM," "analytics implementation," or "tracking plan." For A/B test measurement, see ab-test-setup.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): using-git-worktrees
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 31 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - creates isolated git worktrees with smart directory selection and safety verification

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): web-artifacts-builder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 25 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui). Use for complex artifacts requiring state management, routing, or shadcn/ui components - not for simple single-file HTML/JSX artifacts.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): langgraph-fundamentals
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 15 Source: langchain-ai/langchain-skills Description: INVOKE THIS SKILL when writing ANY LangGraph code. Covers StateGraph, state schemas, nodes, edges, Command, Send, invoke, streaming, and error handling.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): docx
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 57 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): pdf
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 56 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): test-driven-development
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 47 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): rivetkit-client-swiftui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 32 Source: rivet-dev/skills Description: RivetKit SwiftUI client guidance. Use for SwiftUI apps that connect to Rivet Actors with RivetKitSwiftUI, @Actor, rivetKit view modifiers, and SwiftUI bindings.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): office-mcp
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 15 Source: claude-office-skills/skills Description: MCP server with 39 tools for Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF, OCR operations

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): content-strategy
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 33 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to plan a content strategy, decide what content to create, or figure out what topics to cover. Also use when the user mentions "content strategy," "what should I write about," "content ideas," "blog strategy," "topic clusters," or "content planning." For writing individual pieces, see copywriting. For SEO-specific audits, see seo-audit.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): slack-gif-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 24 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Knowledge and utilities for creating animated GIFs optimized for Slack. Provides constraints, validation tools, and animation concepts. Use when users request animated GIFs for Slack like "make me a GIF of X doing Y for Slack."

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): template-skill
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 20 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Replace with description of the skill and when Claude should use it.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): calendar-automation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 10 Source: claude-office-skills/skills Description: Google Calendar and Outlook automation - scheduling optimization, meeting workflows, time blocking, and Slack/Sheets integration

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): ppt-visual
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 10 Source: claude-office-skills/skills Description: Design presentation visuals and slide layouts. Create visual concepts, suggest graphics, and provide design specifications for impactful PowerPoint slides.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): code-review-quality
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 10 Source: proffesor-for-testing/agentic-qe Description: Conduct context-driven code reviews focusing on quality, testability, and maintainability. Use when reviewing code, providing feedback, or establishing review practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): okx-cex-market
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 9 Source: okx/agent-skills Description: This skill should be used when the user asks for 'price of BTC', 'ETH ticker', 'show me the orderbook', 'market depth', 'BTC candles', 'OHLCV chart data', 'funding rate', 'open interest', 'mark price', 'index price', 'recent trades', 'price limit', 'list instruments', 'what instruments are available', or any request to query public market data on OKX CEX. All commands are read-only and do NOT require API credentials. Do NOT use for account balance/positions (use okx-cex-portfolio), placing/cancelling orders (use okx-cex-trade), or grid/DCA bots (use okx-cex-bot).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): okx-cex-trade
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 9 Source: okx/agent-skills Description: This skill should be used when the user asks to 'buy BTC', 'sell ETH', 'place a limit order', 'place a market order', 'cancel my order', 'amend my order', 'long BTC perp', 'short ETH swap', 'open a position', 'close a position', 'set take profit', 'set stop loss', 'add a trailing stop', 'set leverage', 'check my orders', 'order status', 'fill history', 'trade history', 'buy a call', 'sell a put', 'buy call option', 'sell put option', 'option chain', 'implied volatility', 'IV', 'option Greeks', 'delta', 'gamma', 'theta', 'vega', 'delta hedge', 'option order', 'option position', 'option fills', or any request to place/cancel/amend spot, perpetual swap, delivery futures, or options orders on OKX CEX. Covers spot trading, swap/perpetual contracts, delivery futures, options (calls/puts, Greeks, IV), and conditional (TP/SL/trailing) algo orders. Requires API credentials. Do NOT use for market data (use okx-cex-market), account balance/positions (use okx-cex-portfolio), or grid/DCA bots (use okx-cex-bot).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): documentation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 9 Source: mcollina/skills Description: Technical writer specializing in the Diátaxis documentation framework

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): rivetkit-client-swift
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 32 Source: rivet-dev/skills Description: RivetKit Swift client guidance. Use for Swift clients that connect to Rivet Actors with RivetKitClient, create actor handles, call actions, or manage connections.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): okx-cex-bot
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 9 Source: okx/agent-skills Description: This skill should be used when the user asks to 'start a grid bot', 'create a grid bot', 'stop the grid bot', 'show my grid bots', 'grid bot status', 'grid bot P&L', 'create a DCA bot', 'start a DCA bot', 'dollar cost average into BTC', 'set up a martingale bot', 'show my DCA bots', 'stop the DCA bot', 'DCA P&L', or any request involving creating, stopping, querying, or monitoring grid or DCA (Dollar Cost Averaging / Martingale) bots on OKX CEX. Grid and DCA each cover both spot and contract variants. Requires API credentials. Do NOT use for regular spot/swap/futures orders (use okx-cex-trade), market data (use okx-cex-market), or account balance/portfolio (use okx-cex-portfolio).
